Home.badge: The #1 platform for your dental lab.
Home.desc: Connect the dental clinic with the dental laboratory. Manage orders, track status in real-time, and securely transfer STL files.
Home.f1Desc: See immediately if your work is at design, milling, or heading to the clinic. Instant notifications.
Home.f2Desc: All medical data, intraoral files (.stl, .obj), and patient images are stored completely securely.
Home.f3Desc: Send precise instructions to the lab through integrated dental diagrams and direct messaging support.

Auth.successReg: Account created. Check your email for confirmation, then log in.
Auth.rememberMe: Keep me straight logged into the platform
